User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Bloquear páginas de teste ou privadas
Disallow: /teste/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /drafts/
Disallow: /private/

# Bloquear AdsBot das LPs (economizar crawl budget)
User-agent: AdsBot-Google
Disallow: /lp/
Disallow: /obrigado/
Disallow: /campanha/

User-agent: AdsBot-Google-Mobile
Disallow: /lp/
Disallow: /obrigado/
Disallow: /campanha/

Host: https://www.clinicafonoinova.com.br
Sitemap: https://www.clinicafonoinova.com.br/sitemap.xml
